headline: HONEYWELL TECHNOLOGIES TO RELEASE SECOND QUARTER FINANCIAL RESULTS, DISCUSS 2026 OUTLOOK AND HOLD ITS INVESTOR CONFERENCE CALL ON THURSDAY, JULY 23
summary: Honeywell Technologies (NASDAQ:HON) today announced it will issue its second quarter financial results before the opening of the Nasdaq Stock Market on Thursday, July 23. The results for the second quarter will include the former Aerospace Technologies segment, which is now operating as Honeywell Aerospace and trading on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol "HONA" following the spin-off from Honeywell today. headline: Honeywell Aerospace completes spin-off from Honeywell Technologies and begins trading on Nasdaq
summary: Honeywell Aerospace Inc. ("Honeywell Aerospace", Nasdaq: HONA), a leading global tier-1 aerospace and defense supplier of mission critical systems and technologies, today celebrates its first day as an independent, publicly traded company following the completion of its spin-off from Honeywell International Inc. ("Honeywell Technologies", Nasdaq: HON). Shares of Honeywell Aerospace will begin trading on the Nasdaq Stock Market effective at the market opening.

content.title: Honeywell Aerospace completes spin-off from Honeywell Technologies and begins trading on Nasdaq
content.summary: Honeywell Aerospace Inc. ("Honeywell Aerospace", Nasdaq: HONA), a leading global tier-1 aerospace and defense supplier of mission critical systems and technologies, today celebrates its first day as an independent, publicly traded company following the completion of its spin-off from Honeywell International Inc. ("Honeywell Technologies", Nasdaq: HON). Shares of Honeywell Aerospace will begin trading on the Nasdaq Stock Market effective at the market opening.

headline: HONEYWELL TECHNOLOGIES LAUNCHES AS INDEPENDENT, PURE-PLAY AUTOMATION COMPANY FOLLOWING COMPLETION OF HONEYWELL AEROSPACE SPIN-OFF
summary: Honeywell Technologies (NASDAQ:HON) today announced it has completed the previously announced spin-off of its Aerospace Technologies business, which now operates as Honeywell Aerospace. Honeywell Technologies will continue to trade "regular way" on the Nasdaq Stock Market LLC ("Nasdaq") under the ticker symbol "HON," and shares of Honeywell Aerospace common stock will begin trading "regular way" on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol "HONA," effective at the market opening today.

content.title: HONEYWELL TECHNOLOGIES LAUNCHES AS INDEPENDENT, PURE-PLAY AUTOMATION COMPANY FOLLOWING COMPLETION OF HONEYWELL AEROSPACE SPIN-OFF
content.summary: Honeywell Technologies (NASDAQ:HON) today announced it has completed the previously announced spin-off of its Aerospace Technologies business, which now operates as Honeywell Aerospace. Honeywell Technologies will continue to trade "regular way" on the Nasdaq Stock Market LLC ("Nasdaq") under the ticker symbol "HON," and shares of Honeywell Aerospace common stock will begin trading "regular way" on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol "HONA," effective at the market opening today.

headline: Honeywell Aerospace CEO on Separation, Defense Demand
summary: On the first day of trading following its spin-off from Honeywell International, Honeywell Aerospace CEO Jim Currier discussed the company's new status as a standalone aerospace and defense firm. Currier emphasized the company's embedded role within the aerospace and defense ecosystem, highlighting its mission-critical products and services across major commercial and defense platforms. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close."

content.title: Honeywell Aerospace CEO on Separation, Defense Demand
content.description: On the first day of trading following its spin-off from Honeywell International, Honeywell Aerospace CEO Jim Currier discussed the company's new status as a standalone aerospace and defense firm. Currier emphasized the company's embedded role within the aerospace and defense ecosystem, highlighting its mission-critical products and services across major commercial and defense platforms. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close."
